adapt-high-back-synchro-tilter-mvl11724.draft_meta_title: Adapt High Back Synchro-Tilter Chair — MVL11724 | Brant Business Interiors
adapt-high-back-synchro-tilter-mvl11724.draft_meta_desc: Canadian-made high-back task chair from Global Upholstery. Synchro-tilter, 300 lb capacity, GREENGUARD Gold, 15-year warranty. OECM-eligible. Call 1-800-835-9565.
adapt-high-back-synchro-tilter-mvl11724.draft_body_html:
The Adapt keeps your back where it belongs, from the first meeting to the last email.

Built in Canada by Global Upholstery Co., the Adapt pairs a breathable airflow mesh back with a plush upholstered waterfall seat and a synchro-tilter mechanism that moves naturally with your body. Height-adjustable lumbar support and width-adjustable arms with sliding armcaps let you dial the fit to your frame — not the other way around. At 300 lb capacity with a 15-year limited warranty and GREENGUARD Gold certification, this is a commercial-grade chair, not a residential approximation.

Key features

  • Synchro-tilter mechanism with upright tilt lock and tilt tension control
  • Pneumatic seat height adjustment — 17" to 22.5"
  • Height-adjustable flexible lumbar support
  • Height and width adjustable arms with sliding armcaps
  • Breathable airflow mesh back with plush upholstered waterfall seat
  • 300 lb weight capacity · 5-prong fiberglass-reinforced nylon base · dual-wheel carpet casters
  • GREENGUARD Gold certified · Canadian-made · 15-year limited warranty
  • Fixed open-loop arm version also available — MVL11725

Who it's for

Healthcare administrators, municipal managers, school board offices, and private-sector team leads who need a commercial-grade high-back chair that performs under daily use and looks the part in a client-facing space.

Available from Brant Business Interiors — Canada's OECM-eligible commercial furniture supplier since 1964. Delivery across Canada; installation available in Ontario and Western Canada. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current pricing, lead times, or volume quotes.

ibex-mesh-seat-back-armless-drafting-cha.draft_meta_title: Ibex Mesh Armless Drafting Chair MVL2827 | Commercial Office Furniture Canada | Brant Business Interiors — a division of Office Central Inc. (OECM Supplier)
ibex-mesh-seat-back-armless-drafting-cha.draft_meta_desc: The Ibex MVL2827 all-mesh armless drafting stool — 23.5"–33.5" seat height, adjustable footrest, lumbar support, 300 lb capacity. Ships across Canada from Brant Business Interiors.
ibex-mesh-seat-back-armless-drafting-cha.draft_body_html:
The drafting stool for standing-height workstations that actually supports your back.

Most drafting stools are just regular chairs on longer legs. The Ibex MVL2827 is built differently — all-mesh seat and back for airflow through long sessions, height-adjustable lumbar support, and a waterfall seat front that takes pressure off the back of your legs at counter height. Pneumatic adjustment covers a 23.5"–33.5" seat range, and the height-adjustable chromed footrest keeps your feet supported wherever you set it.

Key features

  • Air-flow mesh seat and back (Black / MS69 only) — breathable through a full shift
  • Seat height: 23.5"–33.5" pneumatic adjustment — true drafting and counter height
  • Height-adjustable chromed footrest
  • Waterfall seat front — reduces leg pressure at extended heights
  • Height-adjustable lumbar support
  • Task mechanism with dual-wheel carpet casters
  • Armless; 300 lb weight capacity (arms version: MVL2828)

Who it's for

Graphic designers, architects, lab technicians, reception staff at a standing-height counter, dental and clinical assistants — anyone working above standard desk height who needs real back support, not just a perch. A natural fit for schools, healthcare clinics, manufacturing quality-control stations, and any Ontario or Western Canada workspace built around a drafting table or counter surface.

Available from Brant Business Interiors — Canada's OECM-eligible commercial furniture supplier since 1964. Delivery across Canada; installation available in Ontario and Western Canada. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current pricing, lead times, or volume quotes.

ibex-synchro-tilter-chairs-mvl2801.draft_meta_desc: Ibex MVL2801 synchro-tilt task chair — mesh back, upholstered seat, adjustable lumbar and arms, GREENGUARD certified, 300 lb capacity. Ships across Canada from Brant Business Interiors.
ibex-synchro-tilter-chairs-mvl2801.draft_body_html:
A commercial task chair that moves with you — not against you.

The Ibex MVL2801 pairs a breathable mesh back with a fully upholstered seat, built around a synchro-tilt mechanism that keeps the seat and back moving in coordination as you recline. Multi-position tilt lock lets you set it where you work; tilt tension adjusts to your body weight. The result is a chair that stays comfortable through a full workday without fighting you every time you shift position.

Key features

  • Synchro-tilt mechanism with multi-position tilt lock and tilt tension adjustment
  • Mesh back (Black / MS69) with fully upholstered seat — breathable back, cushioned seat
  • Height-adjustable lumbar support
  • Height-adjustable arms with self-skinned urethane armcaps
  • Waterfall seat edge — reduces pressure behind the knees
  • Properly contoured seat cushions
  • Pneumatic seat height adjustment: 16.5"–20.5"
  • Five-star spider base with dual-wheel carpet casters
  • 300 lb weight capacity · GREENGUARD Certified
  • Seat fabric: Grade 1 seating textiles or Luxhide vinyl (various colours)

Who it's for

Admin staff, coordinators, case workers, office managers — anyone at a standard desk who sits most of the day and needs a chair that earns its keep over years, not months. Equally at home in a municipal office, a community health team, a school admin suite, or a professional-services firm in Ontario or Western Canada.

Available from Brant Business Interiors — Canada's OECM-eligible commercial furniture supplier since 1964. Delivery across Canada; installation available in Ontario and Western Canada. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current pricing, lead times, or volume quotes.

A workhorse low-back task chair that handles daily use without fuss — at a price that makes sense when you're furnishing a room.

The Amigo delivers the fundamentals a busy shared workspace needs: a breathable grey mesh back, contoured fabric seat with waterfall edge, and a center-tilt mechanism with lock and tension control. Height-adjustable molded arms and pneumatic lift keep the fit accessible for a range of users. GREENGUARD certified and UPS-shippable, it's a practical choice for stocking a training room, open office, or multi-person reception area in one order.

Key features

  • Grey mesh back with breathable fabric seat — centre tilt with tilt lock and tension adjustment
  • Pneumatic seat height adjustment — 17" to 20"
  • Height-adjustable molded arms (7.5" arm height)
  • Waterfall seat edge with properly contoured cushions
  • Scuff-resistant high-rise base with twin-wheel carpet casters
  • Soft casters also available — OTG10700
  • GREENGUARD certified · UPS-shippable

Who it's for

Schools, municipal offices, community organizations, and small businesses stocking shared workspaces, training rooms, or multi-station reception areas — where durability matters and per-unit budget counts.

Available from Brant Business Interiors — Canada's OECM-eligible commercial furniture supplier since 1964. Delivery across Canada; installation available in Ontario and Western Canada. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current pricing, lead times, or volume quotes.

ibex-upholstered-seat-back-guest-chair-m.draft_body_html:
A stacking guest chair that looks permanent — and stacks five high when the room needs to change.

The Kompanion MVL2819 is built to sit across from your staff and your visitors without looking like a folding chair in disguise. Fully upholstered seat and back in Grade 1 commercial textiles or LuxPlus vinyl, fixed loop arms, and a wall-saver frame that protects your finishes in high-traffic waiting areas and meeting rooms. When the room needs to flex, it stacks five high.

Key features

  • Fully upholstered seat and back — Grade 1 seating textiles or LuxPlus vinyl (various colours)
  • Back exterior upholstered in Jenny Ebony (JN02)
  • Four-leg wall-saver frame — won't scuff walls in busy corridors or waiting areas
  • Fixed loop arms with polymer armcaps
  • Stacks 5 high for compact storage
  • Made in Canada · GREENGUARD Certified · BIFMA Compliant · Level Certified

Who it's for

Reception areas, client waiting rooms, boardrooms, training spaces, and multi-use meeting rooms at schools, community health teams, municipal offices, and professional-services firms across Ontario and Western Canada. Designed to pair with the Ibex task chair family for a coordinated look across open-plan and private office spaces.

Available from Brant Business Interiors — Canada's OECM-eligible commercial furniture supplier since 1964. Delivery across Canada; installation available in Ontario and Western Canada. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current pricing, lead times, or volume quotes.

armless-low-back-stacking-chair-mvl2748.draft_body_html:
Canadian-assembled and built to stack — the Minto solves the overflow seating problem without sacrificing comfort.

The Minto is a fully upholstered armless stacking chair on a round tube steel frame — sturdy enough for daily use in training rooms and boardrooms, light enough at 16 lbs to move and reconfigure without effort. Stack up to 5 high on the floor or 8 high with the optional dolly (MVL2749), and the footprint disappears when you need the space back. At 300 lb capacity with properly contoured cushions and a waterfall seat edge, it's a real commercial chair, not a folding-table afterthought.

Key features

  • Fully upholstered seat and back — properly contoured cushions with waterfall seat edge
  • Stacks 5 high on the floor · 8 high with optional dolly (MVL2749)
  • Round tube steel frame · 300 lb weight capacity · 16 lbs
  • Assembled and tested in Canada
  • Stocked in Jenny Ebony fabric (JN02, Grade 1) with Black frame
  • Armed version also available — MVL2747
  • Limited Lifetime warranty

Who it's for

Training rooms, boardroom overflow, multi-purpose event spaces, and reception areas at schools, community centres, healthcare facilities, and municipal offices — anywhere that needs chairs ready on short notice without storing them full-time.

Available from Brant Business Interiors — Canada's OECM-eligible commercial furniture supplier since 1964. Delivery across Canada; installation available in Ontario and Western Canada. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current pricing, lead times, or volume quotes.

A commercial task chair with the ergonomics that matter — at a price point that works for fleet orders.

The Ibex MVL2804 combines a breathable mesh back with a fully upholstered seat and a centre-tilt mechanism — the kind of chair that settles into a school admin office, a municipal workstation, or a busy clinic desk and just keeps working. Tilt lock, tilt tension, adjustable lumbar, seat depth adjustment, and height-adjustable arms give each person at each desk the fit they need without calling in a specialist.

  • Mesh back (Black / MS69) with fully upholstered seat — breathable back, cushioned seat
  • Seat depth adjustment — accommodates different leg lengths

Deep cushions, a centre-tilt that moves with you, and upholstery options that suit any boardroom — the Ashmont earns its place at a manager's desk.

The Ashmont medium back management tilter is built by Offices To Go in Canada — a GREENGUARD Gold certified chair with the kind of spec sheet that holds up to institutional procurement review. Height-adjustable 'T' arms with self-skinned urethane armcaps, tilt-tension control with upright lock, and a pneumatic seat that drops to 16" make it a versatile fit across a wide range of users. Choose grade 1 textiles for a professional shared-space finish, or LuxPlus bonded leather for a more executive feel.

Key features

  • Centre-tilt mechanism with tilt-tension control and upright position tilt lock
  • Pneumatic seat height adjustment — 16" to 20"

Managers, directors, and administrative leads at healthcare facilities, school boards, municipal offices, and professional services firms — anyone who needs a commercial-grade management chair that clears institutional procurement standards and holds up to full-day use.

kneeling-chair-kcm1420.draft_meta_title: Kneeling Chair KCM1420 | Ergonomic Office Seating Canada | Brant Business Interiors — a division of Office Central Inc. (OECM Supplier)
kneeling-chair-kcm1420.draft_meta_desc: Office Star KCM1420 kneeling chair — memory foam seat, adjustable height, 275 lb capacity, 15-year warranty on non-moving parts. Ergonomic alternative seating. Ships across Canada.
kneeling-chair-kcm1420.draft_body_html:
For the person whose back has had enough of a conventional chair.

A kneeling chair tips the pelvis forward and distributes weight between the seat and a lower knee pad — a fundamentally different position that takes the compression off the lumbar spine and encourages the natural S-curve without forcing it. The KCM1420 does it with a memory foam seat, a metal frame, and dual-wheel casters so it rolls to wherever the work is. Adjustable height lets you dial in the position; the angled design does the rest.

Key features

  • Thick padded memory foam seat — 100% polyester upholstery
  • Ergonomic kneeling position — forwards pelvic tilt, reduces lumbar compression
  • Adjustable seat height
  • Dual-wheel carpet casters
  • Metal frame, Black finish — armless
  • Weight capacity: 275 lbs / 124.7 kg
  • Dimensions: 17"W × 26"D × 21"H · Weight: 16 lbs
  • Warranty: 15 years (non-moving parts) · 5 years (mechanism and pneumatic) · 3 years (upholstery)

Who it's for

Staff dealing with chronic lower-back discomfort, chiropractic or physiotherapy clinic environments, standing-desk users who want an alternative perch, or anyone looking to break up a conventional seated posture through the workday. A practical ergonomic add-on for schools, health offices, and SMB workplaces across Ontario and Western Canada.

Available from Brant Business Interiors — Canada's OECM-eligible commercial furniture supplier since 1964. Delivery across Canada; installation available in Ontario and Western Canada. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current pricing, lead times, or volume quotes.

The meeting-room chair that stays out of the way and does its job.

Knight is built for conference and collaborative spaces — lightweight at 29 lbs, easy to stack and move between rooms, and finished in a clean all-Black mesh that holds up in busy environments without looking utilitarian.   • Single lever — controls seat height and tilt lock together
  • One-piece mesh seat and back (Black only) — breathable through long meetings
  • Waterfall seat edge — reduces pressure behind the knees

A practical volume buy for any organization outfitting shared spaces that need flexibility — light enough to rearrange, durable enough to leave in place for years.

avro-350m-heavy-duty-multi-tilter-chairs.draft_meta_title: Avro 350 High Back Heavy Duty Multi-Tilter — MVL11716 | Brant Business Interiors
avro-350m-heavy-duty-multi-tilter-chairs.draft_meta_desc: 350 lb capacity Canadian-made task chair. Infinite-position multi-tilter, adjustable lumbar, mesh back, Grade 1 or LuxPlus seat. OECM-eligible. Call 1-800-835-9565.
avro-350m-heavy-duty-multi-tilter-chairs.draft_body_html:
The Avro 350 is built for people who've outgrown standard task chairs — 350 lb capacity, full multi-tilter adjustment, and a Canadian build that lasts.

Designed by Global Furniture Group for users above average height or weight, the Avro 350 delivers a complete ergonomic package without the compromises that show up in cheaper big-and-tall chairs. Infinite-position seat and back angle adjustment (including forward tilt), side-activated sliding seat depth, and height-and-depth adjustable lumbar support cover a wide range of body types. The heavy-duty fiberglass-reinforced base and choice of mesh back colours or upholstered seat textiles mean it holds up in commercial use and fits any office aesthetic.

Key features

  • Multi-tilter with infinite position tilt lock — back and seat angle adjust independently, including forward tilt
  • Side-activated sliding seat depth adjustment
  • Pneumatic seat height adjustment — 18.5" to 22.5"
  • Height and depth adjustable lumbar support
  • Height and width adjustable T-arms with sliding, rotating, lockable armcaps
  • 350 lb weight capacity · heavy-duty 5-prong fiberglass-reinforced nylon base · dual-wheel carpet casters
  • Back: mesh in Black (MS69), Natural (MS74), or Stone (MS71)
  • Seat: all Grade 1 seating textiles or LuxPlus vinyl (multiple colours)

basics-chevron-junior-operator-chair-mvl.draft_meta_title: Basics Chevron Junior Operator Chair — MVL2363-7 | Brant Business Interiors
basics-chevron-junior-operator-chair-mvl.draft_meta_desc: Armless low-back posture task chair in Fusion Fabric Carbon. Pneumatic height, adjustable back angle, GREENGUARD certified. OECM-eligible. Call 1-800-835-9565.
basics-chevron-junior-operator-chair-mvl.draft_body_html:
The Chevron is the focused low-back task chair for operators who need real posture support without the bulk of armrests.

Built by Offices To Go (Global Upholstery Co.), the Chevron Junior Operator is an armless low-back chair in Fusion Fabric designed for users who spend long hours at a desk and want a clean, uncluttered seating profile. Pneumatic seat height adjustment, adjustable back angle, and back height adjustment mean different users can dial the fit across a shared workstation — without needing a dedicated chair for every person. GREENGUARD certified and finished in Carbon, it suits any modern office or study.

Key features

  • Armless low-back design — posture support without the footprint of full armrests
  • Pneumatic seat height adjustment
  • Adjustable back angle and back height — accommodates different body types
  • Fusion Fabric upholstery, Carbon colour — cushioned waterfall seat
  • Hard floor casters
  • GREENGUARD certified

Who it's for

Front desk staff, data entry operators, and smaller-framed users at reception desks, call centres, school admin offices, and healthcare facilities — anywhere a clean, compact task chair is the right fit over a full executive model.

Available from Brant Business Interiors — Canada's OECM-eligible commercial furniture supplier since 1964. Delivery across Canada; installation available in Ontario and Western Canada. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current pricing, lead times, or volume quotes.

kody-mesh-chair-otg13110.draft_body_html:
A high-back synchro-tilt chair with a slim profile that doesn't sacrifice support.

Kody's synchro-tilt mechanism is integrated flush into the seat pan — no protruding hardware, just a clean silhouette with the full ergonomic range underneath. The two-setting tilt tension adjusts to your body weight; multi-position tilt lock and recline lock let you set your working position and stay there. Black polyester seat with a breathable Black mesh back keeps airflow going through longer sessions at a standard or slightly elevated desk.

Waterfall seat edge and contoured cushions

basics-ergo-boss-executie-back-multi-til.draft_meta_title: Ergo Boss Executive Back Multi-Tilter Chair — BAO28703 | Brant Business Interiors
basics-ergo-boss-executie-back-multi-til.draft_meta_desc: Canadian-made executive multi-tilter with Soft Descent lift, lumbar pressure control, adjustable arms, and Fusion Fabric options. OECM-eligible. Call 1-800-835-9565.
basics-ergo-boss-executie-back-multi-til.draft_body_html:
The Ergo Boss is the executive chair that actually adjusts — Soft Descent pneumatic lift, lumbar pressure control, and a full multi-tilter suite in one Canadian-made frame.

Built by Basics (Global Furniture Group) in Canada, the Ergo Boss Executive Back Multi-Tilter goes well beyond the adjustments you'd expect at this price. Independent seat and back angle, infinitely adjustable seat angle, lumbar pressure and height adjustment, and height-and-width adjustable arms with articulating armcaps cover the full ergonomic range. Three seat and back size configurations mean it fits a wider range of body types than a one-size executive chair. Available in Fusion Fabric colours or custom textile — contact us to spec yours.

Key features

  • Soft Descent™ pneumatic seat height adjustment
  • Seat depth adjustment · independent seat and back angle · infinitely adjustable seat angle
  • Adjustable back angle and back height adjustment
  • Lumbar pressure and height adjustment
  • Tilt lock and tilt tension adjustment · centre-tilt movement
  • Height and width adjustable arms with articulating armcaps
  • Waterfall seat edge · properly contoured cushions
  • Three executive seat and back size configurations
  • Fusion Fabric (multiple colours) or custom textile — Canadian-made

Who it's for

Senior managers, directors, and executives at municipal offices, healthcare leadership teams, school board administration, and professional services firms who want a Canadian-made executive chair with a full ergonomic adjustment suite — not just a name on the back.

Available from Brant Business Interiors — Canada's OECM-eligible commercial furniture supplier since 1964. Delivery across Canada; installation available in Ontario and Western Canada. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current pricing, lead times, or volume quotes.

kylie-multi-purpose-stacking-chair-cadet.draft_body_html:
A stacking chair built to handle a gym, a training room, a cafeteria, and a hallway storage rack — in that order.

Kylie is reinforced polypropylene all the way through: lightweight at under 10 lbs, easy to wipe down, and rated for indoor and outdoor use. It stacks 4 high on the floor and 8 high on the optional dolly (OTG6756), ships assembled three to a carton, and arrives ready to deploy. Non-slip glides keep it stable on hard floors; 300 lb capacity means it handles whatever a busy institutional space throws at it.

A management chair that looks the part without asking you to sacrifice a full day of comfort.

Marlee pairs a bonded leather finish with a synchro-tilt mechanism and a properly contoured mid-back — the kind of chair that earns its place behind a desk in a private office or at the head of a boardroom table. Pneumatic height adjustment, waterfall seat edge, and height- and width-adjustable arms mean it fits the person sitting in it, not just the aesthetic of the room.

basics-obusforme-elite-heavy-duty-multi-.draft_meta_title: ObusForme Elite Heavy Duty Multi-Tilter Chair — TS2770-3 | Brant Business Interiors
basics-obusforme-elite-heavy-duty-multi-.draft_meta_desc: 350 lb triple-shift chair. Elastomeric back suspension, G5 arms, ANSI/BIFMA certified, lifetime warranty. OECM-eligible. Call 1-800-835-9565.
basics-obusforme-elite-heavy-duty-multi-.draft_body_html:
The ObusForme Elite TS2770-3 is built for triple-shift punishment — elastomeric back suspension, 350 lb capacity, and fully adjustable G5 arms in a chair tested to ANSI/BIFMA standards.

Where most chairs compromise on one or two ergonomic axes, the ObusForme Elite covers all of them. Elastomeric back suspension adapts to your spine's natural "S" curve rather than just pushing against it. Independent infinite-position back and seat angle adjustment — including forward tilt — sliding seat depth, and 5¼" concealed-ratchet back height adjustment give operators a genuinely dialled fit. The heavy-duty mechanism and 3"-wide back upright are rated for around-the-clock use; the G5 arms raise, lower, widen to shoulder breadth, and rotate to support forearms at any angle.

Key features

  • Heavy-duty mechanism rated for triple-shift / 24-hour use — 3"W back upright
  • Elastomeric back suspension — supports the natural "S" curve of the spine
  • Independent infinite-position back and seat angle adjustment, including forward tilt
  • Sliding seat depth adjustment · high-density seat foam · waterfall seat edge
  • Adjustable back height — 5¼" range via concealed ratchet
  • Fully adjustable G5 arms: height, shoulder-width, and rotation
  • 350 lb weight capacity · 26"W × 25"D × 48"H · 65 lbs
  • Hard floor casters standard · clear vinyl bumper guards included
  • Available in all seating textiles · ANSI/BIFMA certified · Limited Lifetime Warranty

Who it's for

Dispatch centres, healthcare nursing stations, municipal operations desks, and any 24/7 or multi-shift environment where a standard task chair wears out in months — and where 350 lb capacity with genuine ergonomic depth is the baseline requirement, not an upgrade.

Available from Brant Business Interiors — Canada's OECM-eligible commercial furniture supplier since 1964. Delivery across Canada; installation available in Ontario and Western Canada. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current pricing, lead times, or volume quotes.
